title: Quizzes
content:
This page presents the three quizzes and their solutions.
LEC # QUIZZES SOLUTIONS 6 Quiz 1: Physics and perception of sound, microphones (PDF) Quiz 1 solutions (PDF) 13 Quiz 2: Editing, cables & patchbays, EQs, stereo recording, dynamics (PDF) Quiz 2 solutions (PDF) 21 Quiz 3: Digital audio, mixing consoles & strategies, recording sessions, room acoustics and reverberation (PDF) Quiz 3 solutions (PDF)
